text: Aaj subah rasoi mein kaam karte waqt Sasu-maa ne taana mara ki unki beti ki tarah main is sasural ko apna nahi paayi. Apni hidden sexuality daba kar main din bhar is dikhawe ke rishte aur ghar ke kamo mein ghisi ja rahi hoon, thakan se dimaag sunn hai. Par main rukne ka soch bhi nahi sakti, kyunki ek pal ka break bhi unhe mujh par shaq karne ka mauka de dega aur family fear mujhse meri saari duty karwa raha hai.

Saas ne mehmaano ke aage fir kaha ki kundali milne ke baad bhi main unki beti jaisi sarvgun-sampann bahu nahi ban payi. Is urban isolation mein apni asliyat daba kar main roz andar se toot rahi hoon, par mujhe lagatar muskurate hue sabki khatirdaari karni hai. Meri halat aisi hai ki main ek second ke liye bhi rona afford nahi kar sakti, warna 'log kya kahenge' aur meri is jhoothi shaadi ki acting pakdi jayegi.

Aaj kapde dhote waqt Sasu-maa ne apni beti ka example diya ki wo apne pati ko kitna khush rakhti hai jabki mujhme 'aurton wale gun' hi nahi hain. Ek aisi forced shaadi jahan mera koi wajood nahi, wahan duty nibhate-nibhate meri kamar toot chuki hai par main ruka toh sab barbaad ho jayega. Is ghutan aur thakan ke bawajood main bas subah se raat tak ek masheen ki tarah sasural ke farz poore kar rahi hoon taaki kisi ko meri identity par shaq na ho.

Sasu-maa ne aaj fir yaad dilaya ki unki beti kitni sanskari hai aur mere taur-tareeke is khandaan ke hisaab se bilkul ajeeb hain. Apni queer identity ko is naye ghar mein chhupate hue, main din bhar nayi bahu wali saari obligations poori karti hoon bhale hi mera shareer jawaab de raha ho. Agar maine zara si bhi thakan dikhayi toh poore ghar mein kalesh ho jayega, isliye main apni duty se peeche hatne ka risk nahi le sakti.

Aaj Sasu-maa ne saaf-saaf keh diya ki bhari dowry aane ke bawajood main unki beti jaisi dedication nahi dikha pa rahi is ghar ke liye. Apne andar ke darr aur is jhoothi duniya ke structural bojh se main physically khatam ho rahi hoon, par mujhe lagatar kaam karna hi padega. Apne maike ki 'izzat' aur is straight marriage ka cover banaye rakhne ke liye main apni jaan ghis kar unki sari duty poori karne mein lagi hoon.
